Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.model

Class Board

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.model.Board
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Board extends Object implements Serializable
Represents the 10x10 Battleship game board.

Manages grid coordinates, cell states, ship placement, target shooting execution, and board event notification listeners. Implements Serializable to support game persistence.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructors

    Description

    Constructs a new 10x10 Board and initializes all grid cells and fleet manager.

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board()
      Constructs a new 10x10 Board and initializes all grid cells and fleet manager.

  • Method Details

    • getBoard

      public Map<Coordinate,Cell> getBoard()
      Gets an unmodifiable map of all board coordinates and cells.
      Returns:
      Unmodifiable Map of Coordinate to Cell.

    • getFleet

      public Fleet getFleet()
      Gets the fleet attached to this board.
      Returns:
      The board's Fleet.

    • addListener

      public void addListener(BoardListener listener)
      Registers a listener to monitor cell updates on this board.
      Parameters:
      listener - The BoardListener to add.

    • removeListener

      public void removeListener(BoardListener listener)
      Removes a registered listener from this board.
      Parameters:
      listener - The BoardListener to remove.

    • restoreTransientState

      public void restoreTransientState()
      Restores the transient listeners list after deserialization.

    • placeShip

      public void placeShip(Coordinate coordinate, Orientation orientation, ShipType shipType) throws ShipOverLapException
      Places a ship onto the board starting at a specific coordinate and orientation.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - Starting coordinate for the ship placement.
      orientation - Alignment direction (HORIZONTAL or VERTICAL).
      shipType - Type of ship to construct and place.
      Throws:
      ShipOverLapException - If any target cell already contains a ship.

    • getCell

      public Cell getCell(Coordinate coordinate)
      Retrieves the cell object at a given coordinate.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - Target coordinate.
      Returns:
      Cell corresponding to the coordinate.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If coordinate is null.

    • shoot

      public CellState shoot(Coordinate coordinate) throws RepeatedShotException
      Executes a shot at a target coordinate and notifies listeners of state updates.
      Parameters:
      coordinate - Target coordinate to shoot at.
      Returns:
      The resulting CellState (WATER, HIT, or SUNK).
      Throws:
      RepeatedShotException - If the coordinate has already been targeted.

    • isFleetDefeated

      public boolean isFleetDefeated()
      Checks if all ships in the board's fleet have been completely sunk.
      Returns:
      true if fleet is defeated; false otherwise.
